ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory of the product */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "weight_unit" TEXT /* Unit of weight (e.g., kg, lbs) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the product */,
  "return_policy" TEXT /* Return policy for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the subcategory */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., thumbnail, high-resolution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of the product per unit */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, successful, failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateways" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment gateway */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the payment gateway */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_providers" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping provider */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the shipping provider */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the shipping provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the product (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shippingAddresses" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shippingAddresses_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status history entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("id")
)
